use_cases: Display rotating customer testimonials with social proof on landing pages
Showcase quotes from notable users at tech companies like Linear, Vercel, or Stripe
Add animated testimonial sections to SaaS or developer tool websites
Create engaging testimonial carousels with magnetic cursor tracking effects
Implement auto-rotating quote displays with parallax number animations
ai_summary: An elegant testimonial carousel component featuring magnetic cursor tracking with spring physics, parallax effects on decorative numbers, and smooth auto-rotating transitions every 6 seconds. Built with Framer Motion for premium animations and designed for displaying social proof on SaaS, developer tools, or creative platforms.
